steps.title: Center the Wyoming count
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the number of SNOTEL sites in Wyoming. The relevant note is that there are around 90 such sites throughout the state.

steps.title: Reject non-count details
steps.content: Choice B focuses on one site at Cottonwood Creek. Choice C says what SNOTEL sites do, and Choice D focuses on Nora Falkenberg and one example site. The remaining option emphasizes the number. The answer is A.
